mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in FEDFUNDS lowers the discount rate and eases financial conditions, which lifts equity valuations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day S&P 500 forward returns are not positive on average after FEDFUNDS declines, or if the sign flips and negative returns dominate in easing periods over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in RSAFS above prior levels indicates improving nominal consumption and revenue expectations, which supports higher equity prices over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS increases by more than 0.5% versus the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if triggered months show negative 20-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the average post-trigger return is not above the unconditional mean over any 2-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in UNRATE signals labor-market deterioration, weaker income growth, and rising recession risk, which should pressure S&P 500 returns downward over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points from the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rising months fail to precede below-average 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign is positive in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while PAYEMS also rises, firms are expanding output and payrolls together, implying stronger real activity and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform either series alone in predicting positive 60-day returns, or if positive returns are absent when both proxies trend upward.

mechanism_narrative: A rising CPIAUCSL with unchanged or higher FEDFUNDS implies inflation pressure without an offsetting policy cut, which compresses real rates and raises recession risk, producing negative equity returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation runs above 2.5% annualized while FEDFUNDS is not declining
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation, non-easing periods do not lead to below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the combined signal is not stronger than CPIAUCSL alone.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST below recent levels signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and softer future consumption, which should weigh on S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 5% from the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if housing drops are not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the average return is not below zero across triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising unemployment regime, a simultaneous decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE confirms broad labor deterioration, which should cause negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-deterioration pattern does not predict below-zero 60-day SPX returns, or if returns remain positive in a majority of such episodes.

mechanism_narrative: After a GDP slowdown, a rebound in GDPC1 indicates reacceleration in aggregate demand and improves earnings expectations, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth turns positive after two consecutive weak quarterly prints
failure_condition: Reject if GDP reacceleration episodes do not precede positive 60-day SPX returns on average, or if the sign is not positive in at least 55% of triggered cases.
